433 Cory – Zoom AV Room is a hybrid meeting and collaboration space equipped with a Zoom Room system, integrated AV switching, and a Yealink video/sound bar for simple, reliable use. The room is intended for EECS faculty, staff, and research groups.

nded for EECS faculty, staff, and research groups. Capacity: 6–12 people Use cases: Hybrid meetings, remote instruction support, small group discussions, office hours Location: 4th Floor, north end of hallway, Cory Hall How to Reserve the Room Reserv

hallway, Cory Hall How to Reserve the Room Reservations are made through bCal . Add the room’s calendar address in your event: Cory-4-433 (12) This room is available to EECS faculty, staff, and approved groups. Technology in the Room Zoom Room syste

ved groups. Technology in the Room Zoom Room system with touch controller Yealink conference bar (camera, microphone, and speakers) USB-C table connectivity for wired screen sharing Ceiling-mounted projector and pull-down screen Quick Start Guide Sta

ojector and pull-down screen Quick Start Guide Start or Join a Meeting Tap the Zoom Room Controller on the table. Select Start or Join . Use the on-screen keypad or select the meeting from the calendar. Share Your Screen Tap Share Screen on the contr

r. Share Your Screen Tap Share Screen on the controller for wireless sharing (after logging into your Zoom app). Or connect via USB-C for wired sharing. End the Meeting Tap End Meeting on the controller. Select End Meeting for All . Troubleshooting /
